changes.description: Scanner integration via Windows Image Acquisition (WIA) — supports Canon LiDE 400 and other WIA-compatible scanners
Epson C6000 label printer support via Windows GDI printing — renders and prints slab insert labels at up to 1200 DPI
NFC tag programming via PC/SC (ACR1252U reader) — supports NTag213 (simple URL) and NTag424 DNA (SUN/SDM secure cryptographic URL)
System tray mode (--tray flag) — runs silently in the Windows taskbar with status menu
Auto-update system — checks cloud server for new versions on startup, downloads and applies updates automatically
Mock mode for all hardware — develop and test without physical scanner, printer, or NFC reader connected
Hardware status endpoint (/agent/status) — reports connected devices, mock mode state, and agent version
WebSocket-ready architecture for real-time browser communication with the cloud-hosted grading station
